---
title: "Evolving the preprint evaluation world with Sciety"
date: 2025-06-17
categories:
  - Scholarly metadata
  - Scholarly infrastructure
image: "image.jpg"
doi: https://doi.org/10.64000/ehgsy-zbs04
author: 
    - name: Luis Montilla
      orcid: 0000-0002-7079-6775
abstract: "Sciety is a community-led initiative developed by a team within eLife, that brings together expert evaluations of papers in one place. It is focused on preprints, preprint review and curation."
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}

|Related items|
|:-:|
||
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
{{< altmetrics type=large-donut details=true >}}
:::

::::
